item.title: This cat weighs 33 pounds—and obesity is one of the most serious (and most overlooked) diseases in cats. Obesity isn’t just about weight. It affects every system in the body, including: • Joints → arthritis and chronic pain • Liver → risk of hepatic lip
item.description: By @dr.patt.exotic.vet: This cat weighs 33 pounds—and obesity is one of the most serious (and most overlooked) diseases in cats. Obesity isn’t just about weight. It affects every system in the body, including: • Joints → arthritis and chronic pain • Liver → risk of hepatic lip

item.title: Stray Cat Waited at My Door Every Day… This Ending Broke Me 🐱💔 What started as a simple encounter turned into something unforgettable. One day, I met a stray cat and named her 'Little Pretty.' At first, she was cautious - but food became our connection. F
